text.zh: SNARC 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: SNARC is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: SNARC 是马文·明斯基和迪恩·埃德蒙兹建造的早期随机神经模拟强化计算机。它用模拟突触和奖励驱动行为来建模老鼠学习迷宫的过程。
text.en: SNARC was an early stochastic neural analog reinforcement calculator built by Marvin Minsky and Dean Edmonds. It used simulated synapses and reward-driven behavior to model a rat learning a maze.
